V-001.notes: Flow matching papers continue (Riemannian flow matching, diverse flow matching, RL for flow matching, FullFlow, Mobile UMI diffusion policy). No counter-evidence.

V-002.notes: Strong tactile signal: TacO benchmark, roto 2.0 Olympiad, Spacetime OT visuo-haptic, VBT-MPC, ViTacFormer. Tactile research remains active.

V-003.notes: Sim-to-real papers: Mind the Gap scientist, Domain-Adaptive XR teleop, NavRL++, DexJoCo MuJoCo, CoGE. Isaac Lab/Genesis/MuJoCo releases (3.8.1, 0.4.7, 3.8.1) confirm ecosystem vitality.

V-004.notes: Humanoid signals: Genie Sim 3.0, Active Stereo-Camera ACT imitation, PvP proprioceptive-privileged. Semantic index shows Unitree IPO ($608M), R1 Air ($4,900), Amazon×Fauna acquisition. Momentum intact.

V-005.notes: No direct RL fine-tuning VLA signals today. Method trends show rl_finetuning: stable. No counter-evidence.

V-006.notes: World model signals: Emotion-Conditioned pose forecasting, Strengthening Generative Policies through Predictive World Modeling. Stable trend.

V-007.notes: Strong teleoperation signals: RoHIL (human-in-the-loop RL), COBALT (cloud teleop), Empowering Robot Teleoperation study, Bimanual rope from human teleop, SEVO (data-centric collection). No zero-teleop replacement signal.

V-008.notes: OpenVLA fine-tuning paper, Octopus Protocol hardware discovery, CableRobotGraphSim. LeRobot v0.5.1 release confirms open-source momentum.

V-009.notes: Cross-embodiment signals: RIO flexible I/O, Bridging Embodiment Gap video editing, Multi-robot waypoint planning, Flow-Opt multi-robot trajectory, X-Diffusion cross-embodiment training. Method trend declining but no >70% zero-shot transfer claim.

V-010.notes: No direct 3D spatial signals today. Method trend declining. No counter-evidence (no 2D-only SOTA claim).

vla.V-001_V-010_summary: All 10 VLA assumptions confirmed. No invalidation triggers. 52 total VLA signals (11 raw + 31 watch boost + 10 semantic). Tactile and teleoperation domains show exceptional signal density.

A-001.notes: MCP adoption signals: AWS API MCP Server + Bedrock AgentCore, Weaviate MCP coding assistant. No incompatible protocol announcements.

A-002.notes: No direct agentic coding benchmark signals. Constraint Decay paper (arxiv 2605.06445) actually highlights LLM agent fragility in backend code — supports hypothesis that 80% target not yet reached.

A-003.notes: Multi-agent signals: DeepMind Co-Scientist (multi-agent research partner), Amazon Nova Sonic voice agent (multi-agent, tools, session segmentation). Production-grade momentum.

A-004.notes: Strong reasoning signals: HF DeepSeek moment blogs (architectural choices, open-source future), Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 (embodied reasoning), ReasoningBank (agents learn from experience), Google Earth AI (cross-modal reasoning). No stagnation evidence.

A-005.notes: No direct workflow automation signals today. No counter-evidence.

A-006.notes: Geopolitical signals: Google I/O + Gemini Spark + Antigravity, Gemini 3.5 Flash pricing, OpenAI Gartner Leader in enterprise coding, AdventHealth OpenAI partnership, OpenAI discrete geometry proof. No contract cancellations or regulatory blocks.

ai_agent.A-001_A-006_summary: All 6 AI Agent assumptions confirmed. No invalidation triggers. 81 total AI signals (52 raw + 19 watch boost + 10 semantic). Reasoning models and multi-agent frameworks show strongest signal density.

T-003.notes: No freshness violations detected. Daily outputs remain within 72h window.

T-004.notes: No hallucination or source grounding violations detected. All claims traceable to primary sources.

S-001.notes: Open-weight momentum: Gemma 4 (byte-for-byte most capable open), Gemma Scope 2 (safety), VaultGemma (differential privacy), Qwen 3.7 Max on Vercel AI Gateway. Strong open-weight trajectory.

S-002.notes: Pipeline stable. Watch boost + semantic boost functioning. No 3-day gap detected.

system.T-003_S-002_summary: All 4 system assumptions confirmed. Pipeline health stable.

watch_items: V-005 RL fine-tuning: method trend stable but signal count (0 raw) is low — monitor for CoRL 2026 deadline
V-010 3D spatial: method trend declining — watch for 2D-only SOTA claims post-June 2026
A-002 Agentic coding: Constraint Decay paper confirms current fragility — 80% target by EOY remains aggressive
